prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为5972→9046→8623→11037→10797名。2021至2022年位次大幅后移（从5972名降至9046名），2023年略回升至8623名，2024年继续 后移至11037名，2025年略回升至10797名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准位次约10797名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年12人、2022年14人、2023年1 3人、2024年12人、2025年12人，基本稳定在12–14人。2026年计划仅9人，较2025年减少3人，缩招幅度约25%，对竞争有明显缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京外国语大学 为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第79名，属语言类顶尖院校，全国外语类院校中排名第一；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及考研名师学 历造假等舆情事件；抖音热度排名第39（较热），综合热度约117万；2023年曾出现小语种专业录取位次明显下降的信号，整体报考热度近年有所降温；外国语 言文学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校所有外语类专业直接对应；计算机科学与技术、大数据管理与应用等新工科专业依托语言+技术交叉培养。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类 专业2024年热度评估为「一般观望」；计算机类、电子信息类专业持续高热，但北外物理类招生专业中计算机类仅1个名额。湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.02 万人增长约8.4%，竞争略有加剧；北京外国语大学位于北京市，对湖南考生属跨省报考；物理类招生计划仅9人，属极小规模招 生，位次波动性较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10797名、2026年大幅缩招（-25%）对位次的显著缓解作用，以及湖南省物理类考生小幅增长（+8.4%）带来的竞争加 剧效应，缩招的缓解效应占主导，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将较2025年明显前移。预测最低位次约9227名，区间8727–9727名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5972 → 9046 → 8623 → 11037 → 10797 respectively. Rankings significantly dropped from 2021 to 2022 (from 5972 to 9046), slightly recovered to 8623 in 2023, continued to drop to 11037 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 10797 in 2025, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a baseline ranking of approximately 10797 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 12 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, remaining stable at 12–14. The 2026 plan is only 9, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a reduction of about 25%, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is a top-tier language institution, ranking first among foreign language universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving public opinion incidents such as academic fraud by a famous postgraduate entrance exam teacher. Its Douyin popularity ranks 39th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.17 million. In 2023, there were signs of a significant drop in admission rankings for minor language majors, indicating a recent cooling in overall application enthusiasm. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), directly corresponding to all foreign language majors at the university. New engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Big Data Management and Application are based on a language + technology cross-training model.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see'. Computer and electronic information majors remain highly popular, but among the Physics Category enrollment majors at BFSU, Computer Science has only 1 slot. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,200 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application for Hunan examinees. The Physics Category enrollment plan is only 9, a very small-scale enrollment, leading to high ranking volatility.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 10797 in 2025, the significant alleviating effect of the large enrollment reduction (-25%) in 2026 on rankings, and the slight increase in competition due to the 8.4% growth in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province, the alleviating effect of the enrollment reduction dominates. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9227, with a range of 8727–9727.

If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 8727), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Arabic and Computer Science and Technology (Digital Intelligence Technology). If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 9727), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors. BFSU has very few Physics Category enrollment slots (only 9), so the competition landscape can change significantly. It is recommended that candidates carefully choose based on their interests and career plans.
